CC-Adoption + Quick-Close Reality-Check

2026-06-25 · 24 tickets verified against the actual tree + CC capability (5 parallel read-only agents · every verdict carries a cited file:line or CC-fact, guarding the ~60% code-blind false-positive rate)

Bundled PR feat/cc-triage-sweep-and-hardening ships the 3 🟢 items marked shipped and closes the 17 done/stale/no-op tickets. Low-leverage reals (#1473, #1471) and decisions (#2376, #2639) stay open. Full evidence: scratchpad/backlog-reality-check-2026-06-25.md.
